title: Feedback: Support Email Formatting
excerpt:
Description
The emails from Monday.com customer support comes to me in a mostly unformatted and unreadable state.  When I get a reply from a MOnday.com person, there is no line wrap, and the sentences merely run off the …

posts.author: ScottC (Scott Clemmons)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The emails from Monday.com customer support comes to me in a mostly unformatted and unreadable state. When I get a reply from a MOnday.com person, there is no line wrap, and the sentences merely run off the right hand side of the page. This makes it unreadable. Note: This is not an Outlook issue. I receive 10-20 emails from other partners every day. All emails are formatted and wrap based on the size of the email window.

What are you trying to achieve

I’m trying to understand the fixes that the Monday.com support person is suggesting.

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello Scott! Thank you so much for sharing this feedback! Your feedback was clear, but I’d I’d love to pass along visuals to our internal teams to review further. Would you be able to share a screenshot in this thread or in a DM with me?

posts.author: ScottC (Scott Clemmons)
posts.cookedHtml: Certainly. I’ll send you a personal message with screenshots.
